_comment: Maps card image codes (the filename stem from the onepiece-cardgame.com image URL,
e.g. 'OP01-051_p1' from '.../OP01-051_p1.png') to a Cardrush buying-price entry name
substring for precise per-variant price tracking.
When a card image has multiple possible Cardrush price entries (visible in the
'multiplePrices' section of unmatched_prices.json), add an entry here to pin that
image code to the correct name.  The script will then build a separate price-history
entry in cardrush_price_history.json keyed by the image code, which the frontend
looks up before falling back to the shared card code.
